assertions.title: Guest purchase redirects to login with callback preservation

steps.action: Clear cookies and navigate to /products/product-stable-001
steps.expected: Product detail page loads for guest user
steps.observed: Product detail page loaded with Purchase and For sale buttons visible

steps.action: Click Purchase button as guest
steps.expected: Redirect to /login?callbackUrl=<detail-route>
steps.observed: Redirected to /login?callbackUrl=%2Fproducts%2Fproduct-stable-001%3Faction%3Dpurchase

steps.action: Verify login page displayed with callback in URL
steps.expected: Login form shown with callbackUrl parameter in URL
steps.observed: Login form displayed with Welcome Back heading, email/password fields, and callbackUrl preserved in URL

assertions.title: Post-login callback resumes transaction entry point

steps.action: On login page with callbackUrl, fill test@example.com / password123 and click Login
steps.expected: Redirect back to /products/product-stable-001 with purchase intent
steps.observed: Redirected to /products/product-stable-001 and purchase flow modal opened automatically

steps.action: Verify purchase modal opened with quantity step
steps.expected: Purchase flow modal visible on the original detail page
steps.observed: Purchase Items modal displayed with quantity selection for Argentina Home Jersey 2026 at $29.99

assertions.title: Purchase flow includes quantity, summary, and confirmation steps

steps.action: Verify quantity step visible in purchase modal
steps.expected: Quantity selection with item name, price, max quantity, Cancel and Next buttons
steps.observed: Quantity step shows: item name 'Argentina Home Jersey 2026', price $29.99, quantity input (max 85), Cancel and Next buttons

steps.action: Click Next to proceed to summary step
steps.expected: Order Summary with item details, quantity, price, and total
steps.observed: Order Summary shows: Item, Quantity (1), Price per unit ($29.99), Total ($29.99), Back and Continue buttons

steps.action: Click Continue to proceed to confirmation step
steps.expected: Confirm Purchase with total and explicit confirmation button
steps.observed: Confirm Purchase shows: Total $29.99, pseudo purchase disclaimer, Back and Confirm Purchase buttons

evidence.network: No network requests during flow navigation (client-side state transitions)

steps.action: Click Confirm Purchase button
steps.expected: Purchase completes and writes to DB
steps.observed: Purchase Complete! success state shown with 'Your items have been added to My Tickets' and View My Tickets button

steps.action: Verify API shows new owned asset record
steps.expected: API returns new owned asset with user, item, quantity, price, status, and timestamp
steps.observed: API /api/user/owned-assets returns record: userId=cmn78xhlt0000l0x18fqw8atp, itemType=product, itemId=product-stable-001, itemName=Argentina Home Jersey 2026, purchasePrice=29.99, quantity=1, status=confirmed, referenceNumber=OA-20260326-KK3Q10, purchasedAt=2026-03-26T09:10:03.346Z

assertions.title: Purchase success lands on correct account surface

steps.action: Click View My Tickets button after purchase success
steps.expected: Redirect to /my/tickets with new purchase visible
steps.observed: Navigated to /my/tickets. Argentina Home Jersey 2026 appears at top with Confirmed status, $29.99 x 1, Ref # OA-20260326-KK3Q10

assertions.title: Success state is persisted and not modal-only

steps.action: Reload /my/tickets page
steps.expected: Purchase record still visible after refresh
steps.observed: After reload, Argentina Home Jersey 2026 still appears with same data: Confirmed, $29.99 x 1, Ref # OA-20260326-KK3Q10, Mar 26 2026

steps.action: Verify via API that record persists
steps.expected: API returns the same owned asset record
steps.observed: GET /api/user/owned-assets returns the same record with all fields intact (id, userId, itemType, itemId, itemName, purchasePrice, quantity, status, referenceNumber, purchasedAt)

assertions.title: Detail pages remain mobile-safe through pseudo transaction flows

steps.action: Check scrollWidth === clientWidth on /my/tickets at 375px viewport
steps.expected: 375 === 375 (no horizontal overflow)

steps.action: Check scrollWidth === clientWidth on /products/product-stable-001 at 375px viewport
steps.expected: 375 === 375 (no horizontal overflow)

steps.action: Check scrollWidth === clientWidth on purchase flow quantity step at 375px viewport
steps.expected: 375 === 375 (no horizontal overflow)

steps.action: Check scrollWidth === clientWidth on purchase flow summary step at 375px viewport
steps.expected: 375 === 375 (no horizontal overflow)

steps.action: Check scrollWidth === clientWidth on purchase flow confirm step at 375px viewport
steps.expected: 375 === 375 (no horizontal overflow)

steps.action: Check scrollWidth === clientWidth on /events/event-stable-005 at 375px viewport
steps.expected: 375 === 375 (no horizontal overflow)

assertions.title: Purchase flow creates persisted owned assets

steps.action: Complete purchase flow through UI (quantity -> summary -> confirm)
steps.expected: Durable DB record created for owned asset
steps.observed: POST /api/user/owned-assets creates persisted OwnedAsset record. Verified via API: id=cmn794pjn0001l0xqvw84dmrv, userId=cmn78xhlt0000l0x18fqw8atp, itemType=product, itemId=product-stable-001, quantity=1, purchasePrice=29.99

steps.action: Verify record appears on My Tickets page
steps.expected: New owned asset visible in account surface
steps.observed: Argentina Home Jersey 2026 appears on /my/tickets with Confirmed status and reference number OA-20260326-KK3Q10

steps.action: Verify record survives page reload
steps.expected: Record still visible after browser refresh
steps.observed: After reload of /my/tickets, record still present with identical data

assertions.title: Purchase flow initializes a correct starting status

steps.action: Complete purchase and check initial status
steps.expected: New purchase has a clearly defined initial status
steps.observed: New owned asset created with status='confirmed' - a clearly defined initial lifecycle status shown as green 'Confirmed' badge on My Tickets

steps.action: Verify status via API
steps.expected: API returns status field with defined value
steps.observed: API response shows status: 'confirmed' for the newly created owned asset record

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 9 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All purchase flow assertions validated successfully. Guest purchase redirects to login with callback preservation (VAL-FLOW-001). Post-login callback resumes the transaction (VAL-FLOW-003). Multi-step purchase flow with quantity/summary/confirm works correctly (VAL-FLOW-004). Purchase creates persisted DB records with 'confirmed' initial status (VAL-FLOW-006, VAL-MODEL-007, VAL-MODEL-008). Success redirects to My Tickets (VAL-FLOW-007). Data persists after page refresh (VAL-FLOW-010). All pages and flow steps are mobile-safe at 375px viewport with no horizontal overflow (VAL-FLOW-011).
